---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest an idea or enhancement for PathFinder AI
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["type:feature"]
---

<!-- Thanks for helping make PathFinder AI better! 💡 -->

> **Before submitting:** please search [existing issues](https://github.com/harshdwivediiiii/pathfinder-ai/issues) to see if a similar feature has already been requested.

---

## Feature Request / Enhancement

Describe the problem or use case you're trying to solve. What's missing or what could work better?

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can — mockups, wireframes, or pseudocode are very welcome.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? What made you choose this approach instead?

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, screenshots, or links that help explain the request (e.g., links to similar features in other projects, relevant discussions).

---

### Difficulty

Check the level that best describes this feature's complexity:

- [ ] `level:beginner` — straightforward to implement, good for first-time contributors
- [ ] `level:intermediate` — requires some familiarity with the codebase
- [ ] `level:advanced` — complex implementation needing deep understanding
- [ ] `level:critical` — urgent, high-impact feature

### Domain

Check the area(s) this feature relates to:

- [ ] `frontend` — UI components, pages, layouts, styling
- [ ] `backend` — API routes, server logic, middleware
- [ ] `database` — Prisma schema, models, queries, migrations
- [ ] `ai` — Gemini integration, prompts, AI features
- [ ] `ui/ux` — user experience, accessibility, design system
